constraints: The diagnostic must report selection_effect none.
The diagnostic must not change provider prompts.
The diagnostic must not alter context-pack item selection.
The diagnostic must not claim automatic L0 retrieval.
Implementation should proceed only after this PLAN receives a warrant/admission edge.
next_action: No further implementation remains for PLAN-20260706-0001. Completion is certified by WARR-20260706-0002 and VERIFY-20260706-0001. Future automatic L0 retrieval or context-selection behavior requires a separate PLAN and WARRANT.
objective: Extend read-only L0 candidate diagnostics so they can be run against latest-context manifest item IDs and explain candidate relationships without modifying context selection.
proposed_change: Add a diagnostic path that accepts or reads latest-context manifest item IDs and reports which valid L0 summary records match those IDs, while preserving selection_effect none.
rationale: GAP-0001 remains open because automatic L0 discovery is not implemented.
CAP-0002 provides a read-only L0 candidate diagnostic foundation.
The next safe slice is to connect diagnostics to context manifests, not to provider prompts.
This preserves the boundary between diagnostic visibility and prompt/context selection behavior.
risk: Users may interpret context-connected diagnostics as automatic retrieval unless output labels remain explicit about read-only diagnostic status.
success_criteria: A CLI or helper can consume latest-context manifest item IDs for diagnostic matching.
Output clearly distinguishes context manifest IDs, candidate L0 records, and non-matches.
SELF_MODEL.json includes the proposed PLAN after regeneration.
title: Context-manifest-connected L0 candidate diagnostics
